user.title: Add a social feed
user.description: Choose which platform you want to follow a profile on. You can add this integration multiple times to follow multiple profiles.

bluesky.title: Bluesky profile
bluesky.description: Enter the profile handle you want to pull posts from, e.g. @home-assistant.io or just the profile URL. No API key needed.

mastodon.title: Mastodon profile
mastodon.description: Enter the full handle including the instance, e.g. @user@fosstodon.org, or paste the profile URL. If you leave out the instance, mastodon.social is assumed. No API key needed.

x.title: X (Twitter) profile
x.description: Enter the username, e.g. @home_assistant. X requires an API Bearer Token — create one at developer.x.com. Note: X has no free read tier; every poll is billed pay-per-use, so polling defaults to once per hour to limit cost.

error.profile_not_found: Profile not found. Check the handle and try again.
error.invalid_auth: The API bearer token was rejected.
error.rate_limited: The API rate limit was hit. Wait a while and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the service.
